# CAMS services Ltd
# https://www.camsservices.co.uk

> UK chaperone service and chaperone services for children in care, contact transport, school runs and SEND support.

CAMS services Ltd provides professional chaperone services and a safeguarding-first chaperone service for local authorities, schools, foster agencies and families. We also deliver child transport, youth mentoring, family support and SEND support across the UK.

## Chaperone services (priority)

- [Chaperone services UK guide](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/chaperone-services-uk): What chaperone services include, commissioning and safeguarding standards
- [Chaperone & community transport](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/community): Contact centre transport, school runs and community access
- [Make a referral](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/referral): Commission chaperone service cover

## Other services

- [Mentoring and coaching](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/mentoring): One-to-one youth mentoring
- [SEN and education support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/sen): SEND and school engagement support
- [Family support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/routine): Family communication and routines
- [All services](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services)

## Insights

- [Child transport services](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/child-transport-services-uk): Safe transport for children in care and SEND
- [Contact centre transport](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/contact-centre-transport): Court-ordered contact journeys
- [School transport support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/school-transport-support-semh): SEMH-friendly school runs
- [Blog index](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog): All commissioning guides

## Commissioning trends (2026)

- [SEND transport & EHCP commissioning 2026](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/send-transport-ehcp-commissioning-2026)
- [SEMH inclusion commissioning 2026](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/semh-inclusion-commissioning-2026)
- [Foster placement stability commissioning 2026](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/foster-placement-stability-commissioning-2026)
- [Chaperone procurement for local authorities 2026](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/chaperone-procurement-local-authorities-2026)

## Service areas (West London, Essex & Hertfordshire)

- [All service areas](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas): Borough, Essex and Hertfordshire coverage map
- [Chaperone services Ealing](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/ealing): HQ Greenford, Acton, Southall, Hanwell
- [Chaperone services Harrow](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/harrow): Pinner, Stanmore, Wealdstone
- [Chaperone services Brent](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/brent): Wembley, Willesden, Kingsbury
- [Chaperone services Hillingdon](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/hillingdon): Uxbridge, Hayes, West Drayton
- [Chaperone services Barnet](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/barnet): Finchley, Edgware, Mill Hill
- [Chaperone services Hounslow](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/hounslow): Feltham, Brentford, Chiswick
- [Chaperone services Watford](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/watford): Hertfordshire, West London links
- [Chaperone services Hammersmith & Fulham](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/hammersmith-and-fulham): Borders Ealing and Hounslow
- [Chaperone services Richmond](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/richmond-upon-thames): Twickenham, Teddington, Hampton
- [Chaperone services Kensington & Chelsea](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/kensington-and-chelsea): West London commissioning
- [Chaperone services Enfield](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/enfield): Edmonton, Southgate, SEND transport
- [Chaperone services Hertsmere](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/hertsmere): Borehamwood, Bushey, Potters Bar
- [Chaperone services Slough](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/slough): Berkshire, Heathrow corridor

## Essex (Phase 6)

- [Chaperone services Chelmsford](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/chelmsford): Mid Essex county town
- [Chaperone services Brentwood](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/brentwood): West Essex, Shenfield
- [Chaperone services Basildon](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/basildon): South Essex, Pitsea
- [Chaperone services Harlow](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/harlow): North Essex, borders Enfield
- [Chaperone services Colchester](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/colchester): North Essex

- [Chaperone services St Albans](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/areas/st-albans)
